channel.title: Institutional Analysis on Marginalia
channel.description: Recent content in Institutional Analysis on Marginalia

item.title: **Co-opting the Left: U.S. Liberal Institutions and Deradicalization (1945--Present)**
item.description: Co-opting the Left: U.S. Liberal Institutions and Deradicalization (1945–Present)

item.title: What Is an Inclusive Institution?
item.description: An essay arguing that institutional claims of inclusivity are obligations, not branding, and must match mission, capacity, and governance reality.
